title: Pantheon
body:
Dive into a world of mythology with the Pantheon mod for Minecraft! Choose a god to follow from a pantheon of your choice and unlock powerful passive abilities as you level up. Each god grants unique blessings for combat, farming, or survival, and a  mighty "miracle". Face off against mythological creatures like cyclops, giants, and the mighty Hercules to claim legendary items such as divine relics. Forge alliances and prepare for war ! Test your strength against ancient bosses as a disciple of the gods!
![Pantheon Selector](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1424ca235c2075632d162cb0cd8777a1bc507028_0.webp)
